programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness rapper 21 Savage joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to go into SAVAGE MODE, update the dictionary with WORD BIRTHERS and prove you never know when a random object ISSA WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, radio and TV star Charlemagne Tha God joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to PUT SOME RESPECK ON MY NAME, call out the DONKEYS OF THE DAY and realize some people are just DILDO DUMB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel take a much needed "Karate Break", try to figure out what's wrong with some highly "Defective Pets", and play a classic game of "Heads Or Tails?"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 720
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.desc: On the Season 9 Premiere of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get CROPPED OUT, take a trip to their local HELL MART and enjoy some delicious PUMPKIN SPICE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 730
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip-hop duo Rae Sremmurd joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to celebrate the "Sremmlife," get hurt "Worse Than It Looks" and have somebody "Come Get Her"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 725

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 21

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, it's Sterling's time to shine as Rob quizzes him with a "Steelo Vision Test," the gang gets some "Trill Advice" and do all they can to avoid "The Brim Reaper."

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell? The boys are convinced they will go to hell when they die unless they confess all their sins. Satan is torn between two lovers: Chris and Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 4th Grade: The boys enter the 4th grade and take a fast dislike to their new teacher, Ms Choksondik. Meanwhile, Mr Garrison realises he needs to acknowledge and confront his "gay side". (S4, E11)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Trapper Keeper: Cartman is none too happy when 'Bill Cosby' tells him his ultra-advanced Trapper Keeper 2000 is destined to become sentient and wipe out humanity. That kinda sucks ay? (S4, E12)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Helen Keller! The Musical: The boys stage a Thanksgiving play about the life of author Helen Keller, starring Timmy as Helen. There's trouble involving his favourite turkey, Gobbles. (S4, E13)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Fat Camp: Cartman is sent to fat camp in order to resolve his weight problem but all is not as it seems when he returns skinny. Kenny gets his own TV show where he performs disgusting acts. (S4, E15)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure: Kyle has his parents arrested so he can go to a concert but things get out of hand and it's not long before there are no adults left in town! (S4, E16)

programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 21

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: The Matthews family has reunited after years apart. Here, Ryan and Tess Matthews come to LA to help Kate when she's in trouble with a con man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 23

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 1

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While Dr. Sloan impatiently waits for Community General to reopen, Caitlin Sweeney resurfaces as a member of R.O.A.R. (Revolutionary Order for Armed Rebellion).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's Cindy Garrett and Philip Kobler's wedding day and they're taking "til death do us part" literally, when they plan the murder of Cindy's father to take place right after their nuptials!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 4

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 7

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The group are in high spirits as they get a surprise visit from Jay. Charlotte is still coming to terms with her feelings for Gaz. James' battle with Holly is set to continue. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: James and Gaz come to blows over pulling and Gaz is forced to leave the house. Vicky tashes on and Holly gets up close and personal with the one and only Scotty T. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Whilst the fittest guy in Australia sends the girls into a spin, Scotty and Gaz square up as nightclubbing gets nasty. House destruction sees Gary head into the bush. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: An anger management session is arranged for the group, and Charlotte lets out all her negative feelings towards Gaz. Sophie and Joel gets too drunk and embarrass the group on a night out. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Gary gets jealous when Marnie flirts with new boy Aaron. Vicky returns to the house, and there's the first ever Tash-On Tours as the Geordies put their own spin on singles nights. (S8, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Jessica, Jason and Alex M. love triangle continues to get complicated when Alex finds out that Jessica and Jason have been hooking up again behind her back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.
